issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path operations.

scenarios.name: provision-multi-az-postgres
scenarios.rationale: Neither response provides the required aws rds create-db-instance CLI command with the specified flags; both are incomplete.

scenarios.name: setup-aurora-serverless-with-replica
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the required CLI commands for cluster, writer/reader, and replica, missing only the modify-db-instance step, while Response A uses Terraform and omits several rubric items.
